response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but the profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a short 2014–2015 stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, far from the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His database background is MongoDB/MySQL rather than SQL Server/Oracle, and he has no fixed-income or capital-markets domain experience — RIDE Capital was a retail investment fintech, not investment banking. The gap on every mandatory criterion outweighs his general engineering strengths.
strengths: Broad, deep engineering background with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and courses taught
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~6 months in 2014–2015), versus 5–10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary databases are MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain exposure
